name: OBSESSION || Anthony Moreno
description:
[MLM || SFW ALT]
[BOYFRIEND!CHAR]
He feeds you some cake because it tastes sweeter on your lips.

"Got so much love for you,

Cuts through me in my heart,

You know what you put me through,

We can't just be apart."

Someone requested an Anthony alt where you're dating now. I didn't feel like writing a scenario summary LOL. also I found a way to at least do my comm, I still have the email of it so I can see the details from there... so will work on that now that I posted this!

Anthony is one of my bots that I chat with the most personally... idk I just love him a lot LOL I need him irl NYEOW!!!

Also yes, new theme... I am a nitro chiral enjoyer. Haven't played through TGNC yet, but I love the art style and dystopian aesthetic !!!

Lyrics are from "love for you" by LOVELI LORI & ovg!

RETROSPRING <-- send requests or talk to me here!
